data.name: 美好家園與地下城
data.detailed_description:
聲明：本遊戲內登場角色均已超過18歲。

劇情梗概

主人公希洛在平原中央遇見了發呆的女混血精靈。
她的名字叫做琉娜。是在精靈與獸人爭鬥不休的國家——史特萊茲出身的精靈獸人混血。
她的雙親被逮捕，而她也被趕出了家門，正在歎息自己的去處。
於是希洛對她說：
「我們來建造一座種族平等追求自由放飛自我的城鎮吧」
就這樣，兩人的冒險之旅從此拉開序幕。

遊戲介紹

「輕鬆自在地遊戲」或是「不遺餘力地沉浸式收集」，《美麗家園與地下城》的玩法由每位玩家來抉擇！在幻想的世界裏冒險・採集・建造城鎮・過上夢想中的慢生活，是這款RPG遊戲的主打特色！
裝備系統超本格！分為白、藍、綠、黃、橙等多種稀有度！魔法裝備擁有隨機屬性，幾乎找不到一模一樣的！裝備自帶熟練度技能，用久了便能永久學會！
天賦系統超本格！每個角色都有自己特有的天賦樹，坦克特化、肉搏特化、遠程特化、魔法特化，全由你來選擇！

跟隨劇情的進展，不斷挑戰層出不窮的敵人，在體驗RPG內容的同時，還可以享受到其他豐富多彩的要素！要素超出想像的龐大，但即便無法接觸到所有，也能夠體會到屬於自己的樂趣。

玩家可以隨意選擇自己喜好的事情便能體驗到遊戲的樂趣，沒有GAME OVER，想幹什麼就幹什麼，自由就是如此的簡單。

慢生活？建造城鎮？層層遞進的劇情？未知的探索？ 些許的好奇心便能帶你領略這款獨一無二的日式RPG遊戲。一起來探索吧！！！

遊戲特色

  • 女主全語音
  • 經典日式RPG & 成長型生活要素
  • 可修改式探索型迷宮
  • 上千種道具貫穿遊戲始終
  • 多女主好感度培養系統

data.supported_languages:
日文*, 簡體中文, 英文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Home and Dungeon
data.detailed_description:
Please note that all characters in this game are 18 years or older.

STORY

The story follows the protagonist, a half-elf named Ashirock (aka Shiro), who discovers a lone girl in the middle of a plain. Her name is Ryuna, a girl born from the union of an elf and an orc in the country of Stellarites, where the two races are in conflict. She was driven out by the elves and the orcs with nowhere else to go.
Shiro proposes that they create a town where people are not forced out due to their race or other arbitrary reasons, and they begin their adventure in town-building together.

FEATURES

The game is an RPG where players can freely enjoy adventure, collecting, town-building, slow life, and hack-and-slash gameplay in a fantasy world, with options for casual or deep play. The game offers various elements beyond the basic RPG mechanics of advancing the story and fighting enemies.
The game has a vast amount of content, but players can choose what they want to engage with and what they don't. For example, players can eat at a restaurant instead of cooking or simply buy equipment instead of crafting it.
The game emphasizes player choice and freedom, allowing players to do what they want and engage with what they interested, whether it be slow life or town-building.

data.short_description: Embark on an adventure in a fantasy world where you can collect items, build towns, and live the slow life of your dreams - these are the main features of this RPG game! Beyond the standard RPG gameplay, there are various other elements to enjoy.
data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, English
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
